name: Cccs Of The Savannah Area, Inc. - Statesboro Branch
description_short: Non-profit credit counseling agency in Savannah offering debt management plans, credit counseling, and housing assistance to help families restore financial health.
description_long:
CCCS of Savannah is a locally-based, non-profit credit counseling organization that has served the Savannah area for over 60 years, helping hundreds of thousands of people address financial difficulties. The organization positions itself as the only locally-based non-profit credit counseling agency in the region, emphasizing community roots and long-term service commitment.

The organization offers comprehensive financial counseling services including debt management programs designed to coordinate payment plans with creditors, credit and budget counseling to help clients assess and revise their budgets, housing counseling with certified counselors covering foreclosure avoidance and first-time homebuyer programs, and a "My Virtual Counselor" tool that allows clients to estimate savings from debt management plans before meeting with a counselor. All initial consultations are offered at no cost.

CCCS of Savannah distinguishes itself through its non-profit status, certified counselors, judgment-free approach, and emphasis on sustainable financial restoration rather than quick fixes. The website features extensive success stories from clients who successfully paid off significant debt (including one client who eliminated $20,000 in credit card debt over 4 years) and consistently praise the professionalism and courteous service of staff members.

The primary limitation is geographic scope—services appear focused on the Savannah area specifically. While the website demonstrates strong client satisfaction and legitimate counseling services, there is no mention of NFCC certification or HUD approval on the provided content, though these credentials are common among non-profit counseling agencies. Clients should verify licensing and certifications independently.
pros: Non-profit organization with 60-year history serving the Savannah community
All initial consultations offered completely free with no cost barrier to entry
Debt management plans include renegotiated creditor rates and payment terms to make debt manageable
Certified counselors available for personalized guidance and ongoing support
My Virtual Counselor tool allows clients to estimate savings before committing to a plan
Advertises as judgment-free environment specifically designed for people in financial distress
Multiple success stories documenting significant debt payoffs ($20,000+ examples cited)
cons: Geographic limitation—services appear to focus on Savannah area only, making it unavailable nationwide
Website does not explicitly mention NFCC certification or HUD approval, which are standard credentials for nonprofit counseling agencies
No pricing information provided for services beyond the free initial consultation
Limited information about timeline for debt payoff or typical program completion rates
No mention of online or phone-only options for clients outside the immediate Savannah region
best_for: Individuals with maxed-out credit cards seeking affordable debt consolidation without high fees
Savannah-area residents facing foreclosure or seeking first-time homebuyer guidance
People in financial distress who want a judgment-free counseling environment and certified professional guidance
Families wanting to create a structured debt payoff plan with negotiated creditor terms
diagnosis: CCCS of Savannah is best for Savannah-area residents carrying credit card debt or facing housing challenges who want professional, judgment-free guidance from a established non-profit with no upfront fees. The main caveat is that services appear geographically limited to the Savannah area, and potential clients should independently verify the organization's nonprofit status, accreditations, and specific counselor certifications before enrolling.
services: Debt management programs with creditor negotiation
Credit and budget counseling and financial planning
Housing counseling from certified housing counselors
Reverse mortgage education to leverage home equity
First-time homebuyer program connection and guidance
My Virtual Counselor online tool for debt management plan simulation
Ongoing account management and creditor communication
typical_results_timeline: Counseling available within 1-2 weeks of contact.
